prompt: A photorealistic overhead view of an open Japanese manga magazine held in two human hands at the lower left and lower right corners, shown as a dramatic two-page black-and-white comic spread on slightly warm paper with visible page curvature, center gutter distortion, ink texture, screentone shading, and dense speed lines. The magazine fills almost the entire frame on a neutral tabletop. The spread depicts a fictional over-the-top battle sports manga about スカートバウト, with exaggerated action, intense expressions, and absurdly serious tournament storytelling. In the center across both pages, show 2 main full-body schoolgirl fighters in a chaotic combat scene: on the left page center a long-haired teenage girl in a dark school blazer, ribbon tie, pleated skirt, and loafers spins powerfully with both arms raised overhead, her hair and skirt flaring in a circular arc; on the right page center a second teenage girl in a sailor-style school uniform is upside down in a handstand-like impact pose, one leg thrust high into the air, skirt exploding outward with violent motion lines, as if she has been thrown or is counterattacking. Make the composition packed with explosive radial lines, debris-like ink flecks, dramatic foreshortening, and giant bold Japanese sound-effect typography crossing the gutter. The spread should read like a mainstream shonen battle manga but focused on skirts and rotational motion rather than weapons. Include exactly 8 side panels around the central action: 4 stacked along the far left page and 4 along the far right page. On the left side, panel 1 shows a girl standing under a waterfall in ascetic training, panel 2 shows inverted handstand practice in shallow water, panel 3 shows intense physical training on the ground, panel 4 shows 2 girls in a close emotional conversation. On the right side, panel 1 shows a composed rival girl in portrait close-up, panel 2 shows a roaring audience in stadium stands, panel 3 shows a small comedic rules diagram explaining the sport with 2 simplified girls and a skirt icon, panel 4 shows a shocked face close-up reaction. Render all text as authentic Japanese manga lettering and captions, including vertical title calligraphy, side narration boxes, crowd chants, rule panel labels, and large impact kanji; use the visible phrases as inspiration but do not prioritize perfect legibility. Add one oversized vertical title on the left page reading 白鳥の湖 and one huge central impact phrase on the right page reading 倒立回転逆襲. Preserve the feeling of a fake magazine feature or serialized manga chapter discovered in print, with believable halftone dots, slightly worn page edges, high contrast black ink, and a humorous yet sincerely epic tone.
